horoscopes.title: Aries May Horoscope
content: The month of May will bring more tangible events than internal shifts, so get ready to embrace those vibes. This month will start with a powerful full moon in the water sign of Scorpio, and the Moon will be debilitated, so the month will bring financial concerns, but there will be some closures like getting the pending amount, settling some debts or you will be getting some updates about a financial plan. Soon after that Mercury also will come into the second house, and it intensify the communication about financial matters. There will be some talks regarding upskilling, new job, or own ventures. The new moon also will rise in the second house, so there will be new career opportunities too.

Pluto will be retrograding in Aquarius, this shows some shift in social circles, like someone leaving your team, or you leaving them. This will not be a sudden one, but a gradual change, as you understand who is your supporter or not. After two weeks Mercury will move into the third house and Venus will be also there, so you will become busy with short trips, messages, signing documents, writing, or you will enrol some courses. There will be multiple online and offline meetings with siblings, cousins or neighbours too.

Towards the later part of the month, Venus will be moving into the fourth house, so there will be more comfort and peace at home, so you can expect family gatherings, repairs, or family outings too. This is a good time for beautifying your home, so you will buy expensive objects for home. This is a very special month with two full moons, but the second full moon in Sagittarius will take place on the last day of this month, so the events will be lasting till the next month connected to long trips, foreign collaborations and higher studies.

horoscopes.title: Taurus May Horoscope
content: The fifth month of May will be highly impactful, as the planetary transits are impacting your personal and professional life. The month will start with a powerful full moon in the water sign of Scorpio, so your relationships and partnerships will be active for the next six months. There will be closures in the relationships and it can be from personal or professional sector. You will attend social gatherings, which you always wanted to attend. In the coming days, Mercury and Mars and the new moon also will come to the first house, so you will change your appearance, mindset and approach to your life.

Pluto will be retrograding in the tenth house, that shows the delay in projects and slow career growth. This will not be a huge individual change, but it will impact everyone at work. Still, you need to take care of your projects, and make sure you meet your targets and please the managers. This transit may push you to question your career goals, your roles or the quality of your work. Moreover, the solar transit is also moving through your first house until twenty, so this is a testing time for your entire life including persona and professional life.

Venus will move into Cancer, which rules your third house, so there will be a lot of good communication with your friends, network circles, siblings and cousins. You can also expect short travels, buy some electronic gadgets, upskilling, and publishing your articles. The Sun transit will enter the second house on twenty-first, and that will bring the need of more money, as there will be a lot of expenses, so you will have to save as much as you can. This is a very special month with two full moons, and the second full moon will rise in your eight houses on the thirty first again shows the importance of finances.

horoscopes.title: Gemini May Horoscope
content: The fifth month of this year will start with a powerful full moon in the sixth house, so there will be completions at work. These completions can be in a project or a job, or your projects will reach a turning point. The impact of the full moon will last for the next six months, so these completions will up at any time within the six months. Job seekers will get an update regarding their application, so they have to be alert. Please stay away from all kind of arguments at work, and try to be punctual too. Some of the health issues, especially related to digestion will get healed in the next six months too.

The twelfth house of emotional self will be activated throughout the month with various planets, so you will be dealing with some emotional issues and private matters. These transits show the chances to have private conversations, dealing with some secrets and meeting someone in private. Later this week the Sun, Venus and Mercury will be in your sign, that will surely make you outgoing and there will be new beginnings. You will buy new accessories to improve your appearance too, or you will have new personal relationship or meetings too.

The new moon also will rise in the twelfth house, so you have to take care of your physical and mental health too. Venus will move into Cancer, which rules your second house during the later part, so you will have to be very careful with your expenses. Venus in second house surely indicates gains, but the expenses also will be coming up, and there will be new job opportunities too. Pluto will be retrograding in the ninth house, which will bring delay in studies, and you will be like a rebel too. The last day of May will have powerful full moon in Sagittarius, which will further impact your finances.

horoscopes.title: Cancer May Horoscope
content: The month will begin with the full moon in Scorpio, which will impact your creative skills, love, and children. The full moon indicates completions, so you will complete a creative project, or you will take that project into the next level. A matter involving children, and youth will demand your attention too. The Moon gets debilitated in Scorpio, so there will be some challenges in love life or connected with your children as well. You will be focused on the friendships and the network circles throughout this month as the eleventh house will always have transits. So, there will be team ventures, new friends, discussions, planning for financial benefits. Due to the new moon, you will set new goals during this month.

The twelfth house also will be active in the later part as Mercury will come here, so there will be some emotional issues, and you will like to be silent. The Sun also will join here, so there will be the need of emotional and physical healing. You will focus on meditation, prayer and hospital visit for you or for someone else. By the end of the month, the full moon will rise in the sixth house, so there will be completions in work, and you will get healed too.

Pluto retrograde will be in Aquarius, so the financial matters will be complex, so this is not a great month for financial matters, so save as much as you can. There will be financial crunch for everyone, and you also will have to go through that. Venus will come into your sign on eighteenth, from then onwards, you will have solutions for most of the issues. You will go for makeover, buy new clothes or accessories to enhance your appearance. This is a golden opportunity for singles to get into a new relationship.

horoscopes.title: Leo May Horoscope
content: May will bring strong movements in your public and professional life, as many planets including Sun, Mars and Mercury will be impacting tenth and eleventh houses. There will be new projects at work, and business owners will initiate new project, so you cannot avoid any responsibility. There will be important conversations, announcements, or decisions which will impact your role, and long term ambitions. You will get new friends, or you will join new teams as well, so get ready for such changes. This is a very good month to get connected with people who can give you long term goals, so don’t let these energies go in vain.

The full moon will rise in the water sign of Scorpio on the first of May, so a situation connected to home and family will reach a culmination point. The Moon is debilitated here, so you will have some concerns regarding the female figures at home. You will have to take up serious responsibilities like home repairs, real estate deals, and solving some family issues. Pluto will be retrograding through the seventh house so you have to be careful with your personal and professional relationship, if you get a new business deal, then you must cross check the terms and conditions.

As the month progress, Venus will move into the twelfth house, and that will bring healing and will make you intuitive. Venus in Cancer will bring positive changes at home, and that will make you happier. The sleep will be good, and you will have pleasant dreams, which will bring some signals about the future. You will get some updates from the foreign lands, or you will have visitors from the foreign lands. The month will end with full moon in the fire sign of Sagittarius, so you will have completions in the creative projects, and you will solve issues regarding your children.

horoscopes.title: Virgo May Horoscope
content: When the month starts, Venus will be in your tenth house, as it will be in Gemini, so there will be visible developments at work, but this will be the reminiscence from the last month. You will receive some appreciation, support, or recognition from authority figures, or you will get a job opportunity as well. This transit will surely improve your image and reputation, and the workplace environment will also improve. On the first itself, the full moon will rise in the third house, so you will plan for short trips, some projects from communication based domain. This also shows some arguments with siblings, cousins or network circles.

Mercury and Mars will impact your ninth house, so there will be progress in long trip, higher education, and long-term direction. You will take an action plan about your education, or your long trip, but there are chances for blocks as Mars is natural malefic. Teaching, training and interaction with your mentors will be the main theme of this transit. Pluto will be retrograding in the sixth house, so your health matters a lot. Retrogression means, some health issues will reappear, so you have to take care of that as well. Along with that, you will take up new health care practices too.

Venus will move into Cancer, and that will bring supportive developments from team settings, friends and network circles. You will have gains and opportunities coming out from this transit, so, there will be more happiness, from the second part of this month onwards. Job seekers will get the closest opportunities to join a new organisation, so there will be events like getting offer letter or appointment order. The full moon will activate the fourth house, so you will have some events coming up at home. You can also expect real estate deals, home improvement projects or relocation too.

horoscopes.title: Libra May Horoscope
content: The ninth house of long trips and higher studies will be active just like the last month due to Venus’s transit. So, you will get foreign collaborations or you will have plans for long trips, and it can be for personal reasons, higher studies, or for spiritual trips. If you were trying to get an opportunity from media, it will come up during this month. On the first itself, the full moon will rise in Scorpio, which will impact your financial matters, and this Moon is debilitated, so there will be financial concerns. The impact of the full moon will last for the next six months, so you will have to be very careful.

As the month progresses, Mercury, Mars and the Sun will be impacting the eighth house of finances, so for the major days of the month, you will be working hard to meet both ends, but you should know that some days are like that. This is not a favourable time for your financial matters, as there will be fluctuations. Unexpected expenses will also come up, so you should be prepared for that. The new moon will rise in the eighth house, that shows new financial planning regarding loans, tax, PF and insurance.

Venus will move into Cancer in the second part, so there will be career related moves like you getting a new responsibility , a new task, or you will get a new role at work. This is a very good time for job seekers as there will be plenty of chances to get interviews or even a new job offers. This Venus will elevate your happiness amidst the financial issues, so work hard at work and you will surely get great opportunities to get favour from your managers. The full moon will again rise in the third house on the last day, and that will bring completions in travel, projects from media and communication.

horoscopes.title: Scorpio May Horoscope
content: The month of May will start with a full moon in the first house, so you will have a very important turning point in your personal life. This event will impact your personal life, your identity, appearance or you will take a major decision about your personal life. You will be more visible, and make sure your behaviour is proper, otherwise this Moon will bring hard time for you. Venus will impact the finances, so you will communicate about financial matters, joint ventures, loans, tax, PF and insurance. Venus will heal your emotional issues, so there will be some solutions for your relationship issues.

The seventh house will be active throughout this month, as many planets will be moving through Taurus. You will have important conversations with your spouse , business partners, client, close associate, and will take crucial decisions regarding the continuity of the relationships. Pluto will be retrograding in the fourth house, so there will be some repairs at home, which will take more time to get completed. This retrogression will not bring sudden events, but you will have some events which take a long time for get competed, and it can also be connected to the elderly people at home.

By the second half of the month Venus will move into the ninth house, so there will be long trips , foreign collaborations, or programs like cultural exchange. Venus is a natural benefic, so you will get some positive updates about your long trips, visa processing, and also about legal matters. You will be very interested in learning so, you will enrol in a new course, you will write and publish your articles as well. The ninth house indicates spiritual matters, so you can also expect pilgrimages, spiritual activities, and you will spend time with mentors, and spiritual figures.

horoscopes.title: Sagittarius May Horoscope
content: The month of May will start with a powerful full moon in Scorpio, which is a weak Moon, so you have to be careful with your emotional and physical health. The impact of the full moon will last for the next six months, so there will be some concerns, but you will be able to solve it. You will be able to solve a long lasting problem from this month onwards. There will be the need for rest, as you may feel low energy, and it can be also the signal that you need spiritual energy Venus will impact the seventh house, so there will be significant changes in the relationships, and you will find new people around you. New business and personal relationships, and social gatherings also will be the part of this month.

The Sun and Mercury will be impacting the sixth house, so there will be some important events at work, but this is not easy. Workplace atmosphere will be challenging, so stay away from all kind of arguments at work. New job opportunities, new task, and new colleagues can show up. Your lower abdomen also will be sensitive, so you will have to take care of your diet. Pluto will be retrograding in your third house, so there will be a shift in the way you think and communicate. Please avoid unnecessary communication, otherwise you will offend others.

Venus will move into the eighth house in the second half of the month, and that will bring some money, but altogether the expenses will be high during this month. You should save as much as you can otherwise there will be lack of finances. You will discuss the chances for loans, tax, PF, and insurance, but make sure you don’t take any complex plans. Towards the end of the month, the full moon will rise in your sign showing the changes in your personal life.

horoscopes.title: Capricorn May Horoscope
content: This month will begin with a powerful, yet debilitated Moon, so you will be focusing on your team settings and networks. There will be completions in the long term projects, and they will give you clear outcome. Since the Moon is debilitated, there are chances to get into verbal spats with your team mates, and siblings. There will be a dynamic shift in the team settings, some of the team members will leave you or you will be leaving a project or a team. The fifth house of creativity will be active throughout the month, so you will be spending more time in creative activities, with children, and single Capricorn natives will have the closest time to find someone special.

Pluto retrograde through second house shows the financial needs, and some financial needs will get repeated. You have to be careful with your savings, as some expenses may force you to withdraw some money from that. You will rethink about your career, passive income or how you have to use your resources. Financial decisions will need more awareness, and you will spend more time in creative projects. You will also be more selective, about your investments, so make sure they will be legit.

By the second half of the month, Venus will move into the seventh house so it will highlight your relationships, and partnerships. This is a good time to get new relationships from personal and professional domains. If you were going through some relationship issues, this Venus solve them. Social gatherings, business meetings and one to one networking sessions will be coming up. The month will end with a powerful full moon, so your emotions will be main concerns will be evident in the last part of the month. This Moon will make you spiritual, intuitive and dreamy as well.

horoscopes.title: Aquarius May Horoscope
content: The month of May will begin with a full moon in the tenth house, so there will be a major situation connected with your career will come up. The full moon indicates completions, so you will complete a project, receive recognition, or there will be a turning point in your career. This is not a very positive full moon as this Moon will rise in its debilitation sign Scorpio, so you will have to be careful with your performance at work. The Sun and Mercury will impact the fourth house in the early part of the month, so you can expect family meetings, significant events at home, and real estate deals as well.

Pluto will be retrograding in your first house, so you will have to be careful with your personal life and health. This is the time for internal transformation, and it also will impact your identity, appearance, your behaviour, and your attitude. During the second half of the month, the Sun and Mercury will impact the fifth house, so there will be creative projects, and team ventures. You will also attend entertainment events alone or with friends, and there will be many opportunities to be with the youth. Single Aquarius natives will have the closest opportunities to find someone special.

Towards the second half Venus will impact your sixth house, so there will be some creative tasks at work. Venus is a natural benefic, so you will be able to solve the workplace issues, so the workplace will have a better environment. There will be new projects, new colleagues or you will even get a new work device. Please control your sugar intake, as the health also will be impacted by this Venus. The full moon will rise in the eleventh house in the last day, then there will be completions in the long term projects.

horoscopes.title: Pisces May Horoscope
content: The month will begin with a powerful full moon in the ninth house so a situation connected to travel, studies, or long term plans will get the final shape. The full moon indicates completions, so there will be completions in the visa processing or in the legal issues. This is a debilitated Moon, so there are chances for arguments with your managers, mentors or spiritual figures. You will also get opportunities to upskill, train and publish your work. When the month starts, the Sun will be in the third house, so there will be short trips, talks with siblings and a lot of conversations.

Pluto will be retrograding in the twelfth house, so you will have a deep internal shift. You will think about your dears, past situations, or something which having a quiet presence in you. The events due to this retrogression will not be visible, but it will be happening within you. You will move towards spiritual matters, as you feel the need of healing. The sleep will get disturbed with complex dreams which will carry some signals about the future. The Sun will move into the fourth house in the second half, so there will be events like real estate events, home improvement projects, renovation or other family events.

Venus will move into the fifth house in the second half so you will be creative and highly romantic. Single Pisces natives will get the closest chances to find someone special, and you will go for some gatherings where you find them there. People will notice your presence, and you will attract others as well. Children will also give some good news and youth will come to you for inputs. On the thirty-first, the full moon will rise in the eleventh house, so you will complete a long term project.
